description: Weights used to compute final retrieval score for each candidate memory entry. The composite score is: keyword_match * w1 + recency_bias * w2 + semantic_similarity * w3 + frequency * w4. Recency bias is computed as 1.0 - (days_since_entry / max_days), giving recent entries significantly higher scores.
notes: Recency bias weight was increased from 0.20 to 0.35 in v1.3.0 per product request to prioritize recent context. This change has not been fully evaluated for impact on older memory retrieval.
